title: Rs 2000 to Women Heads of Family, 3 Free LPG Cylinders: BJP Releases Manifesto for Tamil Nadu Polls
description: In line with the BJP's Hindutva plank, the party announced that it will declare Thaipoosam as the state festival to honour Lord Murugan and will ensure that the tradition of lighting the Karthigai Deepam at the Thiruparankundram Hilltop is resumed and protected through the years.
